title: Corvus Monstrum
description: A fun exploration into cobblemon with various biomes, large villages, and plenty of technology to automate!
body:
# Welcome to Corvus Monstrum
![You can use my code: theomenden to get 25% off your first month on a server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/06571c95-44fb-4192-87fd-5ec08cd0c08d.webp)
This is a simple exploration (and slightly opinionated) into the wonderful world of Cobblemon!

- With many different ways to experience cobblemon, we've decided to take a much more tech-focused direction. 

- With mods such as Create and Modern Industrialization, you should be able to automate your farms, and have your new pokeballs ready to capture!

 - We also included multiple new biomes thanks to mods like Terralith, Incendium, Regions Unexplored, and Nyctophobia! Allowing you to hunt for pokemon by land, and by sea - while also exploring the total beauty that Minecraft has to offer!

- With multiple performance mods built in, this pack should run quite smoothly on a wide variety of setups, and servers. Sodium, C2Me, Indium, and others help allow you to explore with confidence that it's not going to melt your pc entirely. (NVidium also gets a mention here if you run certain Nvidia graphics cards)

- Speaking of performance increases, we've included mods like Iris to help bring in Shaders, as well as multiple resource packs to help facilitate that common block feeling, with some of that extra polish (especially with Complimentary shaders)

- And where would we be without the mechanics provided by the namesake Cobblemon suite of mods themselves, from being able to breed pokemon, battle others, and look up various pokedex entries, you'll find yourself staring into these for a long time to come! 

Hop on into Corvus Monstrum, and explore what we've taken as a glance into the exciting world of cobblemon!
